Skip to contents
bcaboot 1.0
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Changelog
Computation of bootstrap confidence intervals in an almost automatic fashion as described in Efron and Narasimhan (2020, <doi:10.1080/10618600.2020.1714633>).
